theme: Print a solid layer by layer with overhang rules
title: Overhang-Supported Additive Print
strategies: solid bounding-box baseline: box in the whole target footprint and fill every non-target cell up to the top as support
per-column straight support: support each overhanging target column with its own vertical pillar down to the plate, ignoring neighbours

top-down cascading set cover: plan layer-by-layer from the top down, letting each support voxel's 45-degree shadow cover as much of the NEXT layer's requirement as possible, and preferring support columns with no future part voxel above them (never trapped)
